summary: Role-Based Dashboard Templates fully verified. All 24 backend API tests passed. Frontend verified for all 3 roles: Super Admin (Platform Health, 6 metrics, Top Admins, Platform Campaigns), Admin (5 metrics, Top Advertisers, Campaigns by Status, Team Activity), Advertiser (5 metrics with CTR, Bidding Activity chart, Top Campaigns, Recent Creatives).

issues: Console warning about chart dimensions (-1, -1) - existing issue from previous iteration, non-blocking

critical_code_review_comments: Role-based dashboard endpoint correctly returns different data structures based on user role
Super Admin sees total_admins, platform_health with logins_24h, top_admins list, campaigns_by_status
Admin sees total_advertisers, top_advertisers, campaigns_by_status - correctly no platform_health
Advertiser sees CTR metric, top_campaigns, recent_creatives - correctly no top_advertisers or platform_health

Minor HTML nesting warning in console (
inside

) in Platform Activity section - not affecting functionality
context_for_next_testing_agent: Role-based dashboard templates fully implemented. GET /api/dashboard/role-data endpoint returns: Super Admin (role='super_admin', welcome_message='Platform Overview', platform_health, top_admins), Admin (role='admin', welcome_message='Team Overview', top_advertisers, campaigns_by_status), Advertiser (role='advertiser', welcome_message='Your Campaign Performance', CTR, top_campaigns, recent_creatives). All UI components render correctly per role.

super_admin_dashboard.api_top_admins: VERIFIED - returns list of top admins by spend
super_admin_dashboard.ui_platform_health_banner: VERIFIED - Shows 'Platform Online' with logins metrics
super_admin_dashboard.ui_6_metric_cards: VERIFIED - Total Admins, Advertisers, Campaigns, SSP Endpoints, Win Rate, Total Spend
super_admin_dashboard.ui_top_admins_section: VERIFIED - Shows admin list with advertiser/campaign counts
super_admin_dashboard.ui_platform_campaigns_chart: VERIFIED - Pie chart showing campaign status breakdown

admin_dashboard.api_top_advertisers: VERIFIED - returns list of top advertisers by spend
admin_dashboard.api_no_platform_health: VERIFIED - platform_health NOT present (Super Admin only)
admin_dashboard.ui_5_metric_cards: VERIFIED - Advertisers, Total Campaigns, Team Bids, Win Rate, Total Spend
admin_dashboard.ui_top_advertisers_section: VERIFIED - Shows advertiser list with spend info
admin_dashboard.ui_campaigns_by_status_chart: VERIFIED - Pie chart (shows 'No campaign data' when empty)

advertiser_dashboard.api_top_campaigns: VERIFIED - returns list of top campaigns by wins
advertiser_dashboard.api_recent_creatives: VERIFIED - returns list of recent creatives
advertiser_dashboard.api_no_platform_health: VERIFIED - platform_health NOT present (Super Admin only)
advertiser_dashboard.ui_5_metric_cards: VERIFIED - Active Campaigns, Total Bids, Win Rate, Total Spend, CTR
advertiser_dashboard.ui_bidding_activity_chart: VERIFIED - Area chart showing bids/wins over time
advertiser_dashboard.ui_top_campaigns_section: VERIFIED - Shows campaign list (or 'No campaigns yet')
advertiser_dashboard.ui_recent_creatives_section: VERIFIED - Shows creatives list (or 'No creatives yet')
